title: Wheel Champion
description: Press as fast as you can to help Dauda sprint on the wheel and become a tiny household legend.
futureGameplay: Repeatedly press Space or tap a large mobile button. Dauda’s wheel spins faster with every press during 20–30 second rounds while tracking speed, distance, best score, stamina, and funny finish messages.

title: Hamster Maze
description: Guide Dauda through a tiny maze, collect every seed, and reach home before time runs out.
futureGameplay: Use arrow keys, WASD, or touch controls to collect sunflower seeds, avoid dead ends and simple obstacles, and play through multiple difficulty levels.

title: Catch the Seeds
description: Help Dauda catch falling seeds, build huge combos, and avoid the suspicious foods raining from above.
futureGameplay: Catch sunflower seeds, pumpkin seeds, and treats while avoiding bad or funny falling objects with a combo system, timer, high score, keyboard controls, and touch controls.

title: Where Did Dauda Hide It?
description: Watch carefully, remember Dauda’s hiding place, and find the snack before she forgets where she put it.
futureGameplay: Show a room or habitat image with clickable hiding spots, then reveal whether the snack was hidden in the tunnel, bedding, house, bowl, or wheel across multiple scored rounds.

title: Build Dauda’s Home
description: Arrange Dauda’s wheel, house, tunnels, bowl, bridge, and bedding to create the perfect tiny home.
futureGameplay: Drag and place habitat objects, snap items into valid areas, watch Dauda react to each choice, and show a final habitat rating.

title: Dauda Memory Match
description: Flip the cards and match Dauda photos, seeds, tunnels, wheels, and tiny treasures.
futureGameplay: Use 10 unique images duplicated into 20 cards, track moves and completion time, and save the best score in localStorage.

title: Find Dauda
description: Search Dauda’s tiny world and click every hidden hamster before he disappears into the bedding.
futureGameplay: Play a hidden-object scene with several Daudas hidden at different sizes, a timer, hints, score, and clickable percentage-based target areas.

title: Dauda’s Snack Sort
description: Sort Dauda’s favourite seeds and safe snacks from the foods he should reject.
futureGameplay: Drag items into Dauda Approved or Dauda Says No, then track mistakes, time, score, and funny Dauda reactions.
